summary: Rich, warm sound with low levels captures a great spring‑90 show highlighted by a stellar The Weight and an inspiring The Other One.
review: The recording delivers a rich and warm tonal quality, though the overall level is modest and needs to be turned up. Musically the concert shines – reviewers rave about The Weight and praise this version of The Other One as a prelude to legendary shows that followed, with only a single sore spot noted on Looks Like Rain. Overall the performance is regarded as one of the stronger spring ’90 outings.

ai_rating.rationale: Three out of four reviewers rate the show highly (5,5,4 stars) and praise key songs; recording comments are uniformly positive aside from low volume, yielding a combined weighted score around 4.3.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Rich and warm sound with balanced tonality, but overall levels are low requiring higher playback volume.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on pacing, but reviewers note a consistently strong spring‑90 performance without any noticeable dips.
